case_title: SALVATORE ARIGANELLO VS. BENJAMIN JONES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BENJAMIN INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A  BENJAMIN JONES & ASSOCIATES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-22-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) DEIDRE PAPALEXOPOULOUS, AND GARY HACKER. THE MAY-13-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGANELLO, SALVATORE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR AUG-08-2005. JUN-22-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DEMETRIOS DIMITRIOU APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-19-2005 THROUGH NOV-17-2005.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGANELLO, SALVATORE SERVED JAN-12-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BENJAMIN INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A  BENJAMIN JONES & ASSOCIATES
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR S. CHANDLER VISHER.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGANELLO, SALVATORE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, BENJAMIN INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A  BENJAMIN JONES & ASSOCIATES HACKER, GARY PAPALEXOPOULOUS, DEIDRE DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-13-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-28-2005
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, BENJAMIN INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A  BENJAMIN JONES & ASSOCIATES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HACKER, GARY PAPALEXOPOULOUS, DEIDRE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGANELLO, SALVATORE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-18-2005.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY MORGAN, CHARLES O
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGANELLO, SALVATORE
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT HOYT DANIELS.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR/DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
